title: struthiopteris pendula
intro: Struthiopteris pendula is a species of fern native to the eastern coast of North America, belonging to the family Dicksoniaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Struthiopteris pendula include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
